---
title: "Course Project"
format: html
toc: true
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
## EE656 Course Project
The project is a major component of the course. You will choose a topic in **robotics perception**, implement or validate a method, and communicate your results in a short technical report and presentation.
:::

---

## Key Dates

| Milestone | Date |
|---|---:|
| **Proposal due** | Mar 10 |
| **Progress report** | Apr 12 |
| **Final report** | May 12 |

---

## Project Pages

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .border-primary .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🧭 Guidelines {.card-title}

Scope, team policy, acceptable project types, grading philosophy, and reproducibility expectations.

[Read the guidelines →](guidelines.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .border-primary .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 📝 Proposal {.card-title}

What to submit, required sections, and a self-check checklist.

[Proposal instructions →](proposal.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

:::
